subject: fix(map): location marker not appearing due to effect timing race
body:
The search center marker (blue dot) was never created because the marker
useEffect ran on mount before the map init effect set mapRef.current.
Since searchCenterLocation never changes for the default/initial location,
the effect never re-ran. Added a mapReady state flag set after map init
so the marker effect re-triggers once the map is available.

Tags: map, bugfix, web
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
